title: EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EazyDiner Ventures Solutions:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner Ventures Solutions!
